ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of ₹5,000 has been debited from your savings account (Account No: 1234567890) on 15th April 2026 at 10:45 AM IST. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1800-123-456 or log in to your online banking portal.

Thank you for banking with SBI.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team
SBI Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Project Sync Meeting – Please Join Immediately
spam.body:
Hi Rohan,

Your presence is requested in an urgent project sync. The meeting is scheduled for 4:00 PM IST on 20th April 2026. Please join the meeting using the link below:

<URL>

All the best,

Rajesh Kumar
Project Manager
Acme Solutions
